name: Lost and found - What if I come and find it
short_description: You have achieved an internship at SilverCup, the most renowned technological company in your country. A promising future awaits you: endless working days, tasks not under your responsibility and an unresolved mystery are waiting for you.Will you change the system or will you join it?
detailed_description:
WELCOME TO THE LABOR MARKET


Lost and found - What if I come and find It is a first-person narrative game whose story will take you to the depths of working in a great corporation. After finishing your studies, you have achieved an internship in the maintenance department of SilverCup, the most renowned technological company in your city. A unique opportunity which will bring you a promising future.



You arrive to work on your first day and everything seems calm... way too calm... They end up assigning you the Lost and Found Department, where you will have to arrange the warehouse full of prototypes and items lost by clients using the notes they send you with a short description (sometimes way too short ones) of what they lost.



But that's not going to be your only job. Your boss can call you anytime to make you stuck you with tasks and you will have to get ready to break your back to solve it. No matter how hard it is or that your working day is already over - being relevant for your superiors comes first.

On top of that, someone steals sensitive information from the company during your first day right before your eyes! Why during your first day? Who did that?

HOW MUCH ARE YOUR IDEALS WORTH?


You will get lost in the enormous SilverCup's facilities and you will have to make do without any help. You will have the opportunity to see cutting-edge prototypes and projects which are being developed at the company.



Be productive, don't cause any trouble, respect your bosses' orders and you will get the chance to promote in your job. How far are you willing to go to reach the top of your profession?

ARCADE MODE


In the arcade mode you will be able to work in the Lost and Found Department and compete to earn the highest amount of duros in the least possible time. Improve your record and dethrone the top 3 Steam players in each category.

Once you have enough duros you will be able to spend them to get an assistant or to unlock themed lost items packs (which include decorations for the warehouse and lots of references to pop culture and to the video game world).


  • +180 interactive items and notes to resolve thanks to your prodigious intellect.
  • The player’s ability and agility are rewarded. Do your best and take the first position in the Hall of Fame (Steam worldwide ranking within the game).
  • Unlockable helpers in exchange for duros to make your job easier.
  • Unlockable items packs in exchange for duros.
  • Basket (using lost items to practice this sport is not recommended).
  • Rescue little animals and give them a better life.
